prompt: When the second cue appears, choose the best action.
why_v1: Action should change only when the read and board cues support it.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits the cue set, so the line applies pressure only when the read is strong enough to push the edge.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raising works better because the deeper tournament stack gives your pressure line enough fold equity and postflop leverage to attack.
